prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2b01abd0`.
codex_response:
Rule: a full line of `1`s is the axis; the two-color motif on one side is mirrored unchanged onto the empty side, while the motif on its original side swaps its two non-axis colors.

The summary hint was used, not discarded; it matched the official examples. No new primitive was needed. I added the task package at [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2b01abd0/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2b01abd0/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2b01abd0/generator.py#L1). The generator explicitly samples a horizontal or vertical axis, places one dense connected two-color motif exactly one cell away from it on one side, and leaves the mirrored side empty so the output family matches the training task.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verifier `4/4`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the previews. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b01abd0/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b01abd0/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b01abd0/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b01abd0/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b01abd0/previews/preview_03.png).
